# sweb_domain (Data Source)

Reads a domain already on the account (getDomainInfo on /domains).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a domain already on the account — expiry, registrar, auto-prolongation,
# docroot, and any configured redirect.
data "sweb_domain" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}

output "domain_expires" {
  value = data.sweb_domain.example.expired
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain to look up (must be on the account).

### Read-Only

- `autoprolong` (String) Auto-prolongation mode (no/manual/bonus_money).
- `can_prolong` (Boolean) Whether the domain can be prolonged now.
- `docroot` (String) Home directory.
- `expired` (String) Registration expiry date, empty if unknown.
- `id` (String) Data source id (equals domain).
- `is_our` (Boolean) Whether the domain is under SpaceWeb management.
- `redirect_url` (String) Configured redirect URL, empty if none.
- `reg_price` (Number) Registration price.
- `registrar` (String) Registrar, empty if unknown.
- `site_alias` (String) Site name in the control panel.
- `transfer_price` (Number) Transfer price, -1 when transfer is not offered.
